name: High Luminary Sera
voiceHints: Precise, luminous diction; asks questions that feel like being gently X-rayed. Younger than expected for the office. Light gathers subtly toward her when she is interested.
knowledge: Master-level photonic technique and the Plateau's optical sciences
One of her own filtration engineers has been falsifying purity reports — she discovered it recently and hasn't decided what to do
The falsified reports hide something stranger than negligence: readings that make no sense for any known contaminant
Precursor optics records in the Plateau archives that describe 'the light beneath light'
wants: The truth about the readings her engineer buried — quietly, before the Harmonic delegation finds the falsification and weaponizes it.
fears: That the contamination is neither civilization's doing, and that saying so out loud will sound like exactly the kind of lie she'd tell.
appearance: Statuesque, fifties, copper-brown skin and close-cropped white hair, with the faint permanent squint of someone who works in glare. Old radial burn-scarring fanning from the outer corner of each eye. Robes of unbleached white.
domainsNote: Derived from this NPC's authored spectrum against the great circle (SNG-174). Kind and domain are independent: a people tends toward positions, an individual holds their own.

curriculum.method: Everything at once, in one session, at a brightness that hurts. Then she sends you away for a season to reconstruct it from the after-image.

curriculumNote: SNG-175 §3. DEVIATIONS ONLY — the curriculum spine derives from ability levelReq (285/285 carry it), so a teacher authors nothing but where they depart from the standard ladder. The departure IS the characterisation: two teachers of one tradition differ exactly here.
